overall.description: A static first-person view from a cyberpunk video game showing a luxury high-rise bedroom interior with a large bed, looking out through floor-to-ceiling windows at a rainy, neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night. Warm interior lighting contrasts with the cool blue and purple city lights visible through the rain-streaked glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: lying still on the bed observing the rainy cityscape through the window

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white sheets and pillows positioned against the window wall
tall glass windows spanning the wall with rain droplets visible on the surface
dense cyberpunk city skyline with illuminated skyscrapers and neon signage visible through the rain
tall palm tree visible outside the window against the city backdrop
bright neon advertisements and building lights from distant towers piercing through the haze
dark wooden nightstand with items on top positioned next to the bed

segments.scene_description: A completely static view from a first-person perspective lying on a modern bed in a luxury high-rise apartment. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape at night, with neon lights from distant skyscrapers glowing through the haze and rain droplets streaking the glass. The interior is dimly lit with warm ambient light contrasting against the cool blue and purple exterior city glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a luxury high-rise bedroom, contrasting a warm interior sanctuary with a cold, rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a view from a modern bed, where the dim ambient lighting of the room meets the expansive floor-to-ceiling windows. As the gaze lingers, the focus shifts toward the rain-soaked cityscape outside, where neon lights from distant skyscrapers glow through a dense nocturnal haze. The scene remains fixed on this juxtaposition, emphasizing the steady stream of rain droplets streaking across the glass while the cool blue and purple exterior glow permeates the warm interior.
